basicDetails.schemeName: Marriage Grant of Rs.51,000/- to Daughter/Sister of Personnel Killed/ Disabled in War/ Action/Terrorist Attack/Naxalite Attack/IS Duty

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Marriage Grant to Daughter/Sister of Personnel Killed/ Disabled in War/ Action/Terrorist Attack/Naxalite Attack/IS Duty” scheme was launched by the Home Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to honor and support the families of soldiers who sacrificed their lives for the nation. Under this scheme, a monetary assistance is provided as a wedding gift to the sister or daughter of a martyred officer/soldier.
schemeContent.benefits_md: A gift amount of ₹51,000 is provided for the marriage of the sister or daughter of a martyred soldier/officer.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme provides ₹51,000 as a wedding gift to the sister or daughter of a martyred soldier to honor their sacrifice and support the dependent family.

children.text: The “Marriage Grant to Daughter/Sister of Personnel Killed/ Disabled in War/ Action/Terrorist Attack/Naxalite Attack/IS Duty” scheme was launched by the Home Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to honor and support the families of soldiers who sacrificed their lives for the nation. Under this scheme, a monetary assistance is provided as a wedding gift to the sister or daughter of a martyred officer/soldier.
A gift amount of ₹51,000 is provided for the marriage of the sister or daughter of a martyred soldier/officer.
The applicant (sister or daughter of the martyr) must obtain and fill out the application form available at the District Sainik Welfare Office.
Attach all required documents including verification from the Sainik Welfare Officer and Battle Casualty Report.
Submit the completed application form along with the affidavit and supporting certificates to the District Sainik Welfare Office.
The District Sainik Welfare Officer verifies the application and forwards it to the Directorate of Sainik Welfare, Bhopal.
After approval, the sanctioned amount is transferred directly to the applicant’s bank account.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The applicant (sister or daughter of the martyr) must obtain and fill out the application form available at the District Sainik Welfare Office. **Step 2:** Attach all required documents including verification from the Sainik Welfare Officer and Battle Casualty Report. **Step 3:** Submit the completed application form along with the affidavit and supporting certificates to the District Sainik Welfare Office. **Step 4:** The District Sainik Welfare Officer verifies the application and forwards it to the Directorate of Sainik Welfare, Bhopal. **Step 5:** After approval, the sanctioned amount is transferred directly to the applicant’s bank account.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a dependent (sister or daughter) of a martyred officer or soldier. 1. The deceased officer/soldier must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh. 1. The martyrdom must have occurred during war, military operation, Naxalite attack, terrorist attack, or internal security duty.

children.text: The applicant must be a dependent (sister or daughter) of a martyred officer or soldier.
The deceased officer/soldier must be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The martyrdom must have occurred during war, military operation, Naxalite attack, terrorist attack, or internal security duty.
